title: GlossaryRegistry
description: Global glossary of defined terms. Topic frontmatter references entries here via glossaryTermSlugs. The glossary page and per-topic key-terms sidebar are derived from this file.

slug.description: Kebab-case identifier. No topic prefix — terms are global. Must be unique across all entries.

term.description: Term as it appears in lesson text. Title-case for proper nouns, lower-case for common terms.

definition.description: One to three sentences. Plain language, no unexplained jargon. Grounded in the source reference.

sourceRefs.description: IDs from source registry that define or authoritatively describe this term.

relatedTerms.description: Slugs of related glossary terms. CI checks these resolve. Keep bidirectional: if A lists B, B should list A.

topicSlugs.description: Topic slugs where this term is prominently used. Drives the per-topic key-terms sidebar. Must stay in sync with topic frontmatter glossaryTermSlugs.
